label: Panic of 1907
notes: Knickerbocker Trust collapse Oct 1907; NBER recession May 1907-Jun 1908

label: Postwar depression scare
notes: Widely predicted depression that never came; NBER Feb-Oct 1945

label: Black Monday 1987
notes: NYT only; crash with NO recession within 12 months - key negative case

label: Financial crisis 2008
notes: NYT only; Lehman Sep 2008; NBER Dec 2007-Jun 2009
